# Account Check Payee

This module adds a payee on payment for check printing.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to go to:

- Create Vendor Bills and Register Payment
- Choose payment method is check
- Enter the name of the payee and register normal process
- On payment view, you can see Payee field
